task_name: Validate Sathar retreat-condition selection (pass-2 remediation: bound re-prompt loop)
validation_outcome: PASS - clean build (exit 0); SSWTests reports OK (229 tests) with no failures, including the pre-existing FGameRetreatConditionValidationTest suite. No new failures.
notes: Pass-2 remediation for pass-1 Verifier WARNING: the retreat-condition re-prompt loop in FGame::init() had no upper bound, so a non-NULL but degenerate IStrategicUI (e.g. headless WXStrategicUI with wxTheApp == NULL) that always returns an invalid value would spin forever. Added a documented 1000-attempt cap; m_satharRetreat is only assigned when the final value is actually in 1..5, so an exhausted cap leaves m_satharRetreat at its prior/default value instead of storing a bogus one. Normal behavior (re-prompt until valid; valid-first stores with exactly one call) is unchanged and covered by the existing 3 pass-1 tests, all still green. checkForVictory() switch bodies (C2) and retreat-condition display text untouched; P2-3 cleanUpShips() S2/S3 fix untouched.
